name: autoctr-worker
description: AutoCTR — local PM2 traffic workers. Runtime entry point and runtime deps live in ../shared/. This package only owns the PM2 ecosystem config, the unpacked Chrome extension, the local logs, and the operational scripts. Run `npm install` here to also install ../shared deps via the postinstall hook.

scripts.worker:stop: pm2 stop ecosystem.config.js && pm2 delete ecosystem.config.js
